title: Sprint
description: A time-boxed iteration in agile development methodology, containing a defined set of work items to be completed and delivered.

goal.description: High-level objective that the team commits to achieving during this sprint.

capacity.description: Total story points the team has capacity to complete in this sprint.

velocity.description: Actual story points completed at sprint close.

workItems.description: List of work item identifiers committed to this sprint.

team.description: Identifier of the team executing this sprint.

board.description: Identifier of the board this sprint belongs to.

completedPoints.description: Story points completed so far during the sprint.

created.description: Timestamp when the sprint was created.

modified.description: Timestamp when the sprint was last modified.
